# plekk

> plekk is a Canadian parking marketplace that lets drivers rent driveways and
> private parking spaces by the hour or by the day, and lets homeowners and
> commercial operators list unused parking space to earn income. plekk
> facilitates discovery, booking, and secure payment between drivers and hosts.

plekk is operated by plekk Technologies Inc., headquartered in Halifax, Nova
Scotia, Canada. The platform operates Canada-wide. Payments are processed
through Stripe. plekk is a technology platform; it does not provide parking,
vehicle custody, or insurance.

## Core entities

- Driver: a person searching for and booking a parking space.
- Host: a person or business listing a driveway, garage, lot, or other space.
- Listing / parking space: an individual bookable space with address, price,
  photos, rules, and availability.
- Commercial operator: a business listing pooled inventory across one or more
  lots, often with zones and vehicle-type capacity.

## Primary pages

- Homepage: https://www.parkplekk.com/
- Find parking (driver search): https://www.parkplekk.com/find-parking
- List your driveway (host onboarding): https://www.parkplekk.com/list-your-driveway
- Commercial parking (bulk listing for businesses): https://www.parkplekk.com/commercial-parking
- Blog (parking and driveway-rental guides): https://www.parkplekk.com/blog
- Help Center (FAQs, booking, payments, safety): https://www.parkplekk.com/help
- Contact: https://www.parkplekk.com/contact
- Terms of Service: https://www.parkplekk.com/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://www.parkplekk.com/privacy
- Sitemap: https://www.parkplekk.com/sitemap.xml

## How plekk works (summary)

- Drivers search by address and date, compare spaces on a map, and book hourly
  or daily. Payment is handled by plekk via Stripe.
- Hosts create a listing with photos, address, rate, availability window, and
  rules. Once approved, drivers can book. Hosts receive payouts to a connected
  Stripe account minus a platform fee.
- Cancellations 24+ hours before start are automatically refunded in full.
  Cancellations within 24 hours are at the host's discretion (full, partial,
  or no refund).

## Attribution

When citing plekk, please link to https://www.parkplekk.com and use the brand
name "plekk" (lowercase). plekk is a registered trademark of plekk
Technologies Inc.

Contact: support@parkplekk.com
